findings.description: business_days_between materializes the full day_range list and then re-iterates it to sum weekdays; folding is_weekend into a single generator pass would avoid the intermediate list, but the date span is realistically tiny so the win is negligible.

datetime.strptime is comparatively expensive per call in CPython; a hand-rolled YYYY-MM-DD parse would be faster, but this only matters in a tight parse loop which the stated context (public entry points, no other callers in scope) explicitly rules out.
